title: Sigrun's Tech & Arcana
description: A modpack centered around Create and several add-ons.
body:
## Description
Sigrun's Tech & Arcana is a moderately sized modpack designed to add engineering and a splash of magic to the game. It's built around the Create mod and several of its add-ons, Eidolon, some QOL additions, and other periphreals designed to contribute to the look and immersion of the game.
## Highlights
### Technology
- Create
- Create: Estrogen
- Create: Diesel Generators
- Create: Crafts & Additions
- Immersive Aircraft & Man of Many Planes
### Magic
- Eidolon
- Waystones
### Exploration
- Terralith
- Distant Horizons
- Immersive Portals
- Dynamic Trees
### Multiplayer
- Chat Heads
- Voice Chat
- What Are They Up To

& more!
